tables.description: This subject phenotype table includes subject's race and ethnicity, age, MGMT gene methylation status, prior treatment, metastasis, tumor type, IDH1 status, regions profiled, and whether tumor exhibited hypermutated phenotype.

variables.name: HYPERMUTATOR
variables.description: Whether the tumor exhibits a hypermutated phenotype. This status applies to the patient case and was not assessed for individual tumor region samples.

variables.name: IDH1_STATUS
variables.description: IDH1 gene mutation status obtained for each patient tumor. This status applies to the patient case and was not assessed for individual tumor region samples.

variables.name: METASTASIS
variables.description: Whether the brain tumor is a primary brain tumor, or a metastasis from another location. This status applies equally to all tumor region samples obtained from each patient.

variables.name: MGMT_STATUS
variables.description: A genetic finding indicating that DNA methylation in the promoter region of the MGMT gene has been detected in the patient's tumor. This status was not assessed for individual tumor region samples.

variables.name: PRIOR_TREATMENT
variables.description: Whether the patient had prior treatment at time of sample collection.

variables.name: REGIONS_PROFILED
variables.description: Number of regions of tumor profiled for spatial heterogeneity from each individual patient.

variables.name: TUMOR_TYPE
variables.description: Tumor type of sample obtained from each patient. This type applies equally to all tumor region samples obtained from each patient.

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, and type of biopsy specimen.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: The analyte type of the sample

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: The collection site of the sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: The tumor status of the sample

tables.description: The subject consent data table includes subject IDs, consent information, and biological sex.

This subject sample mapping data table contains mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. Also included is a secondary sample ID.
